title: Bounded Workstation Mirror Validation Of Packet 040 Source Artifact
objective: Mirror exactly the Packet 040 two-file host-side apparatus clear-state source/test artifact into the workstation repo and validate it with existing workstation dependencies only, without publishing the artifact or reopening migration.
active_role: Olares Bounded Workstation Source Artifact Validator
dependency_note: Packet 041 selected bounded workstation mirror validation as the smallest truthful next move because the Packet 040 host artifact still matches the expected two-file scope and SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, while host executable validation remains blocked under the no-install boundary.
required_inputs: Clean workstation baseline for `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/app/apparatus-resource-explorer.tsx` and `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` before mirroring
Existing workstation dependency and validation-tool availability, without installs or package-manager activation/download
Current old-clone branch, commit, and status count at `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`
constrained_outputs: A workstation validation handoff recording host pre-state, exact mirror scope, workstation diff hash, validation commands and results, skipped validation rationale if any validation remains blocked, old-clone preservation, and the next publication/rollback/defer decision candidate

No commit, no push, no source publication, no package or lockfile mutation, no dependency install, no package-manager activation/download, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no migration approval, no host rollback, and no old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is on `clean-main` at `f39f8ddb3593c79333280d3aceabc9d0ceadc1c2` and that the Packet 040 host artifact remains limited to exactly two files.
Reconfirm host `git diff --check` for the two scoped files and host diff SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5` before mirroring.
Confirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Confirm the workstation copy of the two scoped files is clean before mirroring.
Mirror only the two scoped Packet 040 host-file changes into `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Confirm the workstation diff is limited to the two scoped files and its SHA-256 matches `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`.
Run workstation path-scoped `git diff --check` for the two mirrored files.

Run existing-dependency validation only: app-local TypeScript validation and, if it can run without installs or package-manager activation/download, the existing browser smoke path for `apps/operations-web`.
Do not commit, push, publish, roll back the host artifact, or mutate the old clone.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, remote rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, commit, push, publication, host rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only a bounded two-file workstation mirror and existing-dependency validation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 042 revalidated the Packet 040 host artifact on `/home/olares/code/apex` at `f39f8ddb3593c79333280d3aceabc9d0ceadc1c2`, mirrored exactly the two scoped files into `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform`, confirmed the workstation diff SHA-256 matches the host artifact SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, passed workstation path-scoped `git diff --check`, passed app-local `tsc.cmd --noEmit`, passed existing no-install browser smoke with `3 passed`, and kept tracked package and lockfile paths clean. The artifact remains uncommitted and unpublished on both workstation and host, and `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained untouched.
next_action: Open only Packet 043 as the publication/reconciliation or defer decision packet for the now workstation-validated Packet 040 artifact. Do not publish directly from Packet 042 and do not reopen migration.
